intro: Atropa belladonna oil, also known as deadly nightshade oil, is an extract derived from the Atropa belladonna plant, a highly toxic and potent plant native to Europe and Western Asia. Historically, the oil was used in medicine and cosmetics, particularly for its dilating effect on the pupils, which was used to enhance beauty and perceived intelligence. However, due to its extreme toxicity, atropa belladonna oil is highly regulated and its use is generally discouraged, as it can cause severe poisoning and even death if ingested or improperly handled.
